category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a set of Linux networking utilities; official GitHub README says iputils is a set of useful utilities for Linux networking.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is iputils; official GitHub repository is iputils/iputils.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and lists installation, build options, and included tools.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/iputils/iputils, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables include ping, tracepath, and clockdiff; official README lists included networking tools.
